title: Week 1 Recap — Welcome Back to the Lake!
summary: The 2026 season is officially underway at Gull Lake CC. Conditions were pristine, the bent grass greens were rolling true, and a few rivalries picked up right where they left off.
content:
What a way to kick off the summer on the shores of Gull Lake! After a winter that felt way too long, Thursday night match play is back and the course is in absolutely stunning shape. Dan Urban and the crew have the bent grass looking like a carpet — zero excuses out there, gentlemen.

In the North Flight, Johnson & Smith came out swinging and picked up an early point with a solid win over Williams & Brown. Taylor & Anderson and Thomas & Jackson battled to a hard-fought halve — both teams grinding it out right to the 18th with lake views they probably didn't appreciate given the stress involved.

Down in the South Flight, Lewis & Lee set the pace early and look like a team that spent the winter practicing. Green & Adams also grabbed a full point, and if last season is any guide, those two teams could be the ones to beat come September.

Reminder: the Greenside Grill is open after play — let's keep the tradition alive. See you on the first tee next Thursday!
